description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some sides painted black, and the structure features several windows and a single main entry door. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms including a kitchen, dining area with a round table and chairs, and what appears to be bedrooms and a bathroom. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with two on the front and several more distributed along the sides. The main entryway is marked by a plain wooden door without any porch or decorative overhang. The house is compact and efficient, suitable for urban environments where space is at a premium.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, white and black exterior walls, and a simple window and door arrangement. The interior is divided into multiple functional rooms, including a kitchen and dining area.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear of the house with two windows and a clear view of the interior room divisions.
description_view_1: View 1 displays the main entry side with a single wooden door and minimal window openings, highlighting the plain white exterior.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the opposite end with a large windowed door and a glimpse of the dining area inside.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the side of the house with no visible entry, mostly black exterior, and several interior partitions.
attribute_entryway_design: Single plain wooden door, no porch or overhang, minimalistic design
